_global.text:
## Summary Build a full-stack roommate expense-splitting web app (React SPA + Express/Prisma/PostgreSQL API) with email/password auth, households via join-codes, equal-split expenses, pairwise balances, settle-up, URL-addressable routes, a demo seed, and mobile-responsive UI. ## Scope Greenfield: verdict is NEW (empty repo). Monorepo with `backend/` (Express + TypeScript + Prisma) and `frontend/` (React + Vite + TypeScript + React Router v6). Backend serves the built SPA and the API; single Postgres DB. All money stored as integer **cents**. ### Files to create **Root / deploy** - `Dockerfile` — multi-stage: build frontend → build backend → runtime that runs `prisma migrate deploy`, seeds if empty, serves API + static SPA on one port. - `docker-compose.yml` — `app` + `postgres` for local dev. - `.dockerignore`, `.env.example`, root `package.json` (workspace scripts), `README.md` (update). **Backend (`backend/`)** - `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `src/server.ts` — Express bootstrap, JSON middleware, mounts routers, serves `frontend/dist`, SPA fallback. - `prisma/schema.prisma` — models below. - `prisma/seed.ts` — demo household, 3 users, ~10 expenses; prints `SEED_CREDS_JSON` to stdout. - `src/db.ts` — Prisma client singleton. - `src/auth/jwt.ts` — sign/verify JWT (HS256, `JWT_SECRET`), bcrypt hashing. - `src/middleware/auth.ts` — `requireAuth` reads `Authorization: Bearer`, attaches `req.userId`. - `src/middleware/householdMember.ts` — asserts `req.userId` is a member of the target household. - `src/routes/auth.ts` — `POST /api/auth/signup`, `POST /api/auth/login`, `GET /api/auth/me`. - `src/routes/households.ts` — create, join by code, get, list mine, get members/settings. - `src/routes/expenses.ts` — create (with equal-split shares), list (filters: member, date range), get one. - `src/routes/settlements.ts` — create repayment, list. - `src/routes/balances.ts` — `GET /api/households/:id/balances` → per-member net + pairwise `owes` list. - `src/routes/health.ts` — `GET /api/health` (200 ok), `GET /api/health/deep` (DB `SELECT 1`). - `src/lib/balances.ts` — pure function computing net + pairwise from expenses/shares/settlements. **Frontend (`frontend/`)** - `package.json`, `vite.config.ts` (proxy `/api`→backend in dev), `tsconfig.json`, `index.html`. - `src/main.tsx`, `src/App.tsx` — React Router route tree. - `src/api/client.ts` — fetch wrapper injecting JWT from localStorage; 401 → redirect `/login`. - `src/auth/AuthContext.tsx`, `src/auth/RequireAuth.tsx` — route guard. - `src/pages/Login.tsx`, `src/pages/Signup.tsx` (public). - `src/pages/Dashboard.tsx` — recent expenses + **Balances** section (`data-testid="balances-heading"`, `data-testid="dashboard-main"`, `data-testid="expense-list"`, empty-state testids). - `src/pages/History.tsx` — filters bound to `?member=&from=&to=` via `useSearchParams`. - `src/pages/HouseholdSettings.tsx` — join code display, member list, create/join forms. - `src/pages/ExpenseDetail.tsx` — single expense at `/expenses/:id`. - `src/pages/AddExpense.tsx` / `SettleUp.tsx` — forms (routes `?modal=add-expense` / `?modal=settle`). - `src/components/` — `BalancesPanel`, `ExpenseList`, `Layout` (mobile nav), `EmptyState`. - `src/styles.css` — mobile-first, usable at 375px, no horizontal scroll. ### Dependencies - Backend: `express`, `@prisma/client`, `prisma`, `jsonwebtoken`, `bcryptjs`, `zod`, `cors`, `typescript`, `tsx`, `@types/*`. - Frontend: `react`, `react-dom`, `react-router-dom`, `vite`, `@vitejs/plugin-react`, `typescript`. - Infra: PostgreSQL 16. ### Integrations None — no third-party APIs or SDKs. ### Assumptions - Stack chosen (no prior code): React+Vite SPA + Express/Prisma/PostgreSQL, JWT (Bearer) auth — matches the JWT recommendation for React/Node stacks. - Money stored as integer cents; equal split distributes remainder cents to the first N members so shares sum exactly to the total. - `full_auth` behaviour (signup/login/logout/guards); no admin surface since spec says plain users only. Public routes: `/login`, `/signup`, `/api/health`, `/api/health/deep`. - A user may belong to multiple households; dashboard defaults to the most recently active and is addressable as `/households/:id` (root `/` redirects there or to onboarding). - Join code = 6-char uppercase alphanumeric, unique. - Balances "net" = sum(paid) − sum(owed) + settlements; pairwise computed by greedy debt reduction. ## Implementation Plan ### Step 1: Scaffold monorepo & tooling **Files:** root `package.json`, `backend/`, `frontend/`, `.env.example`, `docker-compose.yml`. **Change:** Set up workspaces, TS configs, Vite, Postgres compose service, env vars (`DATABASE_URL`, `JWT_SECRET`, `PORT`). ### Step 2: Prisma schema & migration **File:** `backend/prisma/schema.prisma` **Change:** Models — `User(id, email @unique, passwordHash, name, createdAt)`; `Household(id, name, joinCode @unique, createdAt)`; `Membership(userId, householdId, joinedAt, @@unique([userId,householdId]))`; `Expense(id, householdId, description, amountCents Int, payerId, createdAt)`; `ExpenseShare(expenseId, userId, shareCents Int)`; `Settlement(id, householdId, fromUserId, toUserId, amountCents Int, createdAt)`. Generate initial migration. ### Step 3: Auth **Files:** `src/auth/jwt.ts`, `src/routes/auth.ts`, `src/middleware/auth.ts` **Change:** Signup hashes password (bcrypt), creates user, returns JWT. Login verifies + returns JWT. `me` returns current user. Zod-validate inputs. ### Step 4: Households + membership **File:** `src/routes/households.ts`, `src/middleware/householdMember.ts` **Change:** Create household (generate unique join code, add creator as member). Join by code (idempotent membership). List my households; get members/settings. Guard household-scoped routes by membership. ### Step 5: Expenses with equal split **File:** `src/routes/expenses.ts` **Change:** On create, validate payer + selected members are household members; split `amountCents` equally, distribute remainder to earliest members; persist `Expense` + `ExpenseShare[]`. List supports `member`, `from`, `to` filters ordered by `createdAt desc`. Get-one returns expense + shares. ### Step 6: Settlements + balances **Files:** `src/routes/settlements.ts`, `src/routes/balances.ts`, `src/lib/balances.ts` **Change:** Record repayment (from/to/amount). Balances endpoint computes per-member net and pairwise "A owes B" list from shares + settlements via pure `computeBalances()`. ### Step 7: Health + server assembly **Files:** `src/routes/health.ts`, `src/server.ts` **Change:** Mount routers under `/api`, add health endpoints, serve `frontend/dist` with SPA fallback (non-`/api` → `index.html`). ### Step 8: Frontend routing & auth **Files:** `src/App.tsx`, `src/api/client.ts`, `src/auth/*` **Change:** Routes: `/login`, `/signup` (public); guarded `/`, `/households/:id` (dashboard), `/history`, `/settings`, `/expenses/:id`. `RequireAuth` redirects unauthenticated users to `/login`. Client attaches Bearer token. ### Step 9: Dashboard + Balances panel **Files:** `src/pages/Dashboard.tsx`, `src/components/BalancesPanel.tsx`, `ExpenseList.tsx` **Change:** Fetch recent expenses + balances. Render `

Balances

`, `data-testid="dashboard-main"`, `data-testid="expense-list"`, and empty states with testids. Modal routes `?modal=add-expense` / `?modal=settle`. ### Step 10: History with URL-bound filters **File:** `src/pages/History.tsx` **Change:** Use `useSearchParams` for `member`/`from`/`to`; changing a filter updates the URL; on load, params drive the query so reloading reproduces the view. ### Step 11: Settings & expense detail **Files:** `HouseholdSettings.tsx`, `ExpenseDetail.tsx` **Change:** Show join code + members + create/join forms; expense detail addressable at `/expenses/:id`. ### Step 12: Mobile styling **File:** `src/styles.css` **Change:** Mobile-first layout, stacked nav, fluid widths so all pages are usable at 375px with no horizontal scroll. ### Step 13: Demo seed **File:** `backend/prisma/seed.ts` **Change:** Create demo household, 3 members (known passwords), ~10 expenses across members, a settlement or two. Print `SEED_CREDS_JSON={"users":[{"email":...,"password":...}],...}` to stdout. ### Step 14: Dockerfile & deploy wiring **File:** `Dockerfile` **Change:** Multi-stage build; runtime runs `prisma migrate deploy`, conditionally seeds, starts server. Ensure `/api/health/deep` verifies DB for Colossus health checks. ## Testing Strategy - **Auth:** signup → login → `/me` returns user; bad password rejected; guarded route without token → 401. - **Households:** create returns join code; second user joins with code → appears in members. - **Expenses:** add expense with N members → each share = amount/N (remainder distributed, shares sum to total); appears in recent list. - **Balances:** after expenses, net amounts sum to zero; pairwise reflects who owes whom. - **Settle up:** record A→B repayment → pairwise A–B decreases by that amount. - **Deep-links:** filter history, copy URL, reload → same filtered view; visiting `/expenses/:id` renders detail. - **Health:** `/api/health` 200; `/api/health/deep` 200 when DB up. - **Seed:** run seed → `SEED_CREDS_JSON` on stdout; logging in with those creds shows seeded dashboard. - **Mobile:** load dashboard at 375px → nav + Balances visible, no horizontal scroll; testids present. ## Risks - **Money precision:** integer cents + remainder distribution prevent drift; verify shares always sum to total. - **Pairwise reduction:** greedy netting must not produce phantom debts; unit-test `computeBalances`. - **SPA fallback vs API routes:** ensure `/api/*` is matched before the catch-all `index.html` route. - **Seed idempotency:** guard so re-running the container doesn't duplicate the demo household. - **JWT secret:** must be provided via env in production; app should fail fast if missing.

requirements.text: rename the dashboard Balances heading to Who Owes What
